arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres fires clearest Arsenal transfer message yet ahead of January window
arts.sum: Sporting CP striker Viktor Gyokeres is setting his sights on joining one of Europe's elite teams amidst transfer speculation linking him with a move to Arsenal. Gyokeres boasts an impressive tally of 26 goals in 24 appearances across all competitions this season.
